Home.title: Build Your Career in {highlight}
Home.subtitle: Join Meru County Government and make a meaningful impact in your community. Discover opportunities across health, education, agriculture, and more.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Getting started is easy. Follow these simple steps to apply for positions.

step1.title: Create Your Profile
step1.description: Register for an account and complete your profile with your qualifications, experience, and documents.

step2.title: Browse Opportunities
step2.description: Explore available positions across various departments and find roles that match your skills.

step3.title: Apply & Track
step3.description: Submit your application online and track its status through your dashboard in real-time.

featured.title: Featured Opportunities
featured.subtitle: Recently posted positions open for application

equalOpportunity.title: Equal Opportunity Employer
equalOpportunity.description: Meru County Public Service Board is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of gender, disability, ethnicity, or religion. Qualified candidates, including persons with disabilities and those from marginalized communities, are encouraged to apply.
equalOpportunity.noFees: No fees are charged for job applications.

Hero.title: Welcome to Meru County Public Service Board
Hero.subtitle: Join our team and help us build a better Meru together. Explore current job openings and start your career in public service.

Vacancies.title: Available Vacancies
Vacancies.subtitle: Discover opportunities to serve the people of Meru County.
Vacancies.searchPlaceholder: Search by job title, department or job group...
Vacancies.noResults: No vacancies found matching your criteria.
Vacancies.noVacanciesDesc: Check back later for new job opportunities.
